basis: Local seed identifies a RW legendary creature from Secrets of Strixhaven Commander.
Scryfall card context verifies oracle text and color identity.
EDHREC Commander context and SOC set context exist; cEDH relevance is not proven.

source_limit_notes: Expected packages are role signals, not copied public decklists.
Finality-counter recursion should be treated as value, not as a guaranteed loop.

themes.name: boros_small_permanent_recursion
themes.notes: Excava attacks to return mana value 3 or less artifacts, creatures, or non-Aura enchantments from the graveyard.

themes.name: graveyard_setup_and_loot
themes.notes: Discard, mill, and sacrifice setup turn the attack trigger into reliable value.

themes.name: etb_death_value_with_finality
themes.notes: Returned cards should create value immediately because finality counters cap repeat recursion.

themes.name: spirit_flying_token_pressure
themes.notes: Returned permanents become 1/1 flying Spirits, so anthem/token payoffs are secondary support.

examples: seven-mana haymakers with no mana value 3 recursion target role
avoid_patterns.reason: Excava's trigger returns only low-mana permanents.
The profile is RW and must not import off-identity engines.

examples: artifact-loop shell as the default plan
avoid_patterns.reason: Loop play is not proven as the product default and should be bracket-gated.
